sections.description: Vue.js 3 single-page application built with Vite and TypeScript for the Claude Code metrics dashboard.
sections.purpose: Provides a modern, component-based frontend for visualizing Claude Code metrics. Built with Vite for fast dev/build, TypeScript for type safety, and Chart.js for data visualization. Build output is placed in internal/query/dashboard/dist/ for Go embedding.
strengths: Strict TypeScript with noUncheckedIndexedAccess catches null/undefined bugs at compile time
Composition API with composables for clean state management without Pinia overhead
Each Chart.js component owns its canvas lifecycle (onMounted/watch/onBeforeUnmount) preventing memory leaks
CSS Modules via <style module> for scoped styling with no class name collisions
Named exports only per project conventions
Vite proxy config enables seamless dev experience against local Go server
weaknesses: No component-level tests (only utility function tests) — would benefit from vue-test-utils integration tests
Chart.js bundle (~355KB gzipped ~117KB) is the dominant dependency; could tree-shake unused chart types
No error boundary or loading states for individual chart components
sections.test_coverage: Vitest tests for utility functions: format.ts (fmtNum, fmtCost, fmtDuration — 11 tests) and heatmap.ts (computeLevels — 4 tests). No component tests yet.
dependencies: chartjs-adapter-date-fns ^3.0.0 — time scale adapter for Chart.js
vite ^6.2.0 — build tool and dev server
@types/node — Node.js type definitions for vite config
sections.functionality:
- Fetches metrics from Prometheus API endpoints (/api/v1/query, /api/v1/query_range) via typed API client
- Renders summary cards (tokens, cost, active time, sessions, commits, PRs, lines changed)
- Displays activity trend heatmaps (daily calendar, day-of-week, hourly)
- Renders 10 Chart.js visualizations: tokens/cost over time, languages, tool usage, LoC, tokens/cost by model, cost per 1K, token type distribution, activity by session
- Collapsible sections for Code Activity, Token Breakdown, Efficiency & Cost Analysis
- Time range selector (1m to 90d) and auto-refresh (30s interval)
- Vite build outputs to ../internal/query/dashboard/dist/ with base path /dashboard/
sections.files:
| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| package.json | Dependencies, scripts (dev, build, test, lint) |
| package-lock.json | Locked dependency versions |
| tsconfig.json | TypeScript config: strict, noUncheckedIndexedAccess, ES2021 target |
| tsconfig.node.json | TypeScript config for vite.config.ts (composite, node types) |
| vite.config.ts | Vite config: vue plugin, /dashboard/ base, build output to internal/query/dashboard/dist/, dev proxy for /api |
| vitest.config.ts | Vitest config: node environment |
| index.html | Entry HTML with #app mount point |
| env.d.ts | Vite client and .vue module type declarations |
| src/ | Application source code |
